sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: F.N.B. Corp. expands Common app offerings
feed.summary: F.N.B. Corp. has expanded its eStore Common application offerings to include business loan products. This enhancement, part of the company's Clicks-to-Bricks digital strategy, allows clients to apply for over 50 consumer and business products using AI and data analytics to streamline the process. According to CEO Vincent Delie, Jr., this strategy aims to boost client acquisition and engagement, reinforcing F.N.B. Corporation's position as an industry leader.

feed.title: FTC Solar to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
feed.summary: FTC Solar, Inc. announced its management team will attend upcoming investor conferences. They will participate in the UBS Global Energy and Utilities Conference on March 17, 2026, and the Roth Conference on March 23, 2026, where CEO Yann Brandt will host a fireside chat. Both events will include in-person investor meetings to discuss the company's solar tracker systems and services.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Michael Shafer Sells Shares of Thermo Fisher Scien
feed.summary: Michael Shafer, Executive Vice President at Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc (TMO), sold 1,607 shares of the company on March 11, 2026. This transaction increased his total holdings to 20,949.9546 shares. Over the past year, Shafer has exclusively sold shares, with a total of 22 insider sells and no buys for the company, which is currently considered modestly undervalued based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Futu Holdings (NasdaqGM:FUTU) Margin Surge To 51.7% Tests Skeptical Narratives
feed.summary: Futu Holdings (NasdaqGM:FUTU) reported strong Q4 2025 results with revenue of HK$6.0 billion and basic EPS of HK$24.31, contributing to a trailing net profit margin of 51.7%, up from 43.8% in the prior year. The company's earnings growth of 120.7% year-over-year significantly surpasses the mid-teens annual growth typically forecast by analysts. While the current share price of US$143.01 screens below a DCF fair value of US$193.20 and an analyst target of US$232.37, skeptics question the sustainability of these high margins and growth rates given potential regulatory and competitive pressures.

feed.title: Mizuho Securities Remains a Buy on Fiserv (FISV)
feed.summary: Mizuho Securities analyst Dan Dolev reiterated a Buy rating on Fiserv (FISV) with a $100.00 price target. This recommendation aligns with similar Buy ratings from other analysts, although Cantor Fitzgerald maintained a Hold rating. Fiserv reported Q4 earnings with $5.28 billion in revenue and $811 million in net profit.

feed.title: Intuit Stock Shock: What TurboTax’s Parent Is Really Signaling to You Now
feed.summary: Intuit, the parent company of TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp, is undergoing significant changes driven by AI integration, shifting management guidance, and updated analyst ratings. The article explores how these developments impact consumers through potential upsells, pricing adjustments, and regulatory scrutiny, while also examining the company's stock performance and investor outlook. It advises users to pay close attention to AI features, pricing transparency, and competitive alternatives to maximize value.

feed.title: Did Globe Life's (GL) Board Expansion and Dividend Hike Just Shift Its Capital Allocation Story?
feed.summary: Globe Life (GL) recently expanded its Board of Directors and approved a higher quarterly dividend of US$0.33 per share, signaling a continued focus on governance and consistent cash returns. This move reinforces the company's commitment to returning cash to shareholders, an important factor as it navigates ongoing regulatory investigations and strives for steady earnings growth through technology initiatives. While these changes don't drastically alter the immediate outlook, they highlight the increasing importance of managing credit and regulatory risks to sustain these cash returns.

feed.title: Foghorn Therapeutics (FHTX) FY 2025 Losses Reinforce Bearish Unprofitability Narrative
feed.summary: Foghorn Therapeutics (FHTX) reported FY 2025 results showing Q4 revenue of US$9.2 million and a basic EPS loss of US$0.34, contributing to an annual net loss of US$74.3 million against US$30.9 million in trailing revenue. Despite forecast annual revenue growth of 27.19%, the company remains unprofitable with negative shareholders' equity, prompting concerns about its balance sheet and funding risk. The stock trades at a P/S ratio of 13.5x, higher than peers, which reflects both growth expectations and financial risks.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Crews Preparing for Strong Winds on Friday; Offers Customers Tips to Prepare and Stay Safe
feed.summary: FirstEnergy is preparing for a severe windstorm expected to hit its service area from early Friday into early Saturday, with strongest winds anticipated Friday afternoon. The company has activated its incident command structure and mobilized additional crews to accelerate restoration efforts, as high winds can impede repairs. Customers are advised to secure outdoor items, charge devices, and be aware of safety procedures, including how to report outages.

feed.title: Arista Networks (ANET) Positioned for Ethernet Opportunity
feed.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) is seen as a strong contender in the computer hardware sector, particularly benefiting from the expanding role of Ethernet in artificial intelligence. Chief Platform Officer John McCool highlighted significant advancements in standardizing both back-end and front-end networks for AI. Additionally, Needham analyst Ryan Koontz raised his price target for ANET, maintaining a Buy rating due to strong fourth-quarter performance and an improved 2026 guidance.

feed.title: International Paper Director Buys $500K in Stock
feed.summary: International Paper Company Director Anders Gustafsson purchased 13,217 shares of the company's stock for nearly $500,000, significantly increasing his ownership stake by over 100%. This insider buying activity is seen as a positive signal, suggesting confidence in the company's future despite recent headwinds, and could indicate a potential turnaround for the paper and packaging firm.

feed.title: Six-state utility FirstEnergy braces for 75 mph winds, power outages
feed.summary: FirstEnergy (NYSE: FE) is preparing for a severe windstorm with peak gusts of 50–75 mph in parts of Ohio and Pennsylvania, and 35–60 mph in other service areas, beginning Friday. The company has activated its incident command structure, mobilized crews, and provided customers with safety and outage reporting tips. Restoration efforts may be slowed by high winds, which prevent the use of bucket trucks, and by fallen trees and blocked roads.

feed.title: Shift4 Vs. Global Payments: Which Is The Better Recovery Play? (NYSE:FOUR)
feed.summary: This article compares Shift4 Payments (FOUR) and Global Payments Inc. (GPN), both operating in the payments sector and currently trading at low EV/EBITDA multiples. The author rates both as "Buys," favoring GPN due to its larger scale and integration of Worldpay, while acknowledging FOUR's double-digit revenue growth and international expansion. The analysis aims to determine if their weak stock performances stem from company-specific issues or broader industry weakness, as both operate in the merchant acquiring segment with different strategic focuses.

feed.title: Insider Selling: NetApp (NASDAQ:NTAP) EVP Sells 1,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: NetApp's EVP Elizabeth O'callahan sold 1,000 shares of company stock for $100,670 on March 10th, reducing her holdings by 4.68%. The sale occurred after NetApp reported strong Q4 results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and issuing positive FY26 guidance. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.52 per share and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with a target price of $122.42.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Cisco Systems (NASDAQ:CSCO) EVP Sells $134,410.08 in Stock
feed.summary: Cisco Systems EVP Thimaya Subaiya sold 1,744 shares of CSCO stock worth $134,410.08, reducing her stake by 1.10%. This insider sale follows Cisco's strong Q2 performance, which exceeded earnings and revenue estimates and highlighted significant AI momentum. The company also announced a dividend increase to $0.42 per share, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for the stock.

feed.title: Caterpillar Inc. (CAT): Our Calculation of Intrinsic Value
feed.summary: This article presents a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis for Caterpillar Inc. (CAT), estimating its intrinsic value per share at approximately $182. Despite Caterpillar's strong industry position and cash generation, the analysis concludes that its current market price of around $707 is significantly above this estimated intrinsic value, suggesting a limited margin of safety for value-focused investors. The author details the inputs and calculations used in the DCF model, including forecasted free cash flows, terminal value, and net debt.

feed.title: NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ:NXPI) Announces $1.01 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ:NXPI) announced a quarterly dividend of $1.014 per share, payable April 9th to shareholders of record on March 25th. This dividend, which equates to an annual yield of approximately 2.1%, appears sustainable given the company's payout ratio and modest dividend growth. NXP recently exceeded Q4 earnings expectations and provided Q1 guidance, with its stock trading near $191.22.

feed.title: Western Digital Shares Drop 2.8% as Analysts Weigh In
feed.summary: Shares of Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) dropped by 2.8% to $257.30 on Thursday, March 12, 2026, amid mixed reviews from Wall Street analysts. While some firms upgraded the stock and maintained 'buy' or 'outperform' ratings, indicating a positive outlook, others suggest it might be time to sell. The data storage company's performance and analyst sentiment offer insights into the broader storage market and technology sector.

feed.title: Chipotle offering BOGO deal for customers ‘tatted like a Chipotle bag’
feed.summary: Chipotle is bringing back its "tatted like a Chipotle bag" buy-one-get-one-free deal this Friday, March 13, from 3 to 4 p.m. local time, for customers with any type of tattoo. This promotion, inspired by Adam Levine's Super Bowl 2019 look, previously generated Chipotle's highest-ever sales during a non-peak hour in 2025. This year, hip-hop artist Swae Lee is collaborating with the brand, including exclusive temporary tattoo flash sheets at a Midtown Miami location.

feed.title: Neighbors complain of chemical smell near Sherwin-Williams plant in Beaver County
feed.summary: Residents near a Sherwin-Williams plant in Rochester, Beaver County, are complaining of a persistent chemical smell, described as nail polish remover, which they believe originates from the facility. One resident, Kristina Warnick, notes the smell is affecting daily life, forcing her son to sleep in the hallway. KDKA Investigates found the Pennsylvania DEP issued the plant a violation for failing to install a thermal oxidizer and perform required stack testing.

feed.title: Assessing Gevo (NasdaqCM:GEVO) Valuation After Stronger Sales And A Smaller Annual Net Loss
feed.summary: Gevo (GEVO) has reported stronger 2025 sales of US$160.58 million and a reduced net loss of US$33.84 million, drawing attention to its valuation, especially after a significant share price increase over the last year. Despite the positive earnings and potential acquisition plans, its P/S ratio is notably higher than industry averages, raising questions about whether current market expectations are already stretched, even though a narrative-driven fair value suggests the stock is undervalued. Investors are encouraged to assess the intrinsic value, risks, and potential returns on new projects before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Gevo (NASDAQ:GEVO) Director Gary Mize Sells 107,100 Shares
feed.summary: Gevo (NASDAQ:GEVO) Director Gary Mize sold 107,100 shares of the company's stock for a total of $249,543.00, reducing his stake by 27.58% to 281,226 shares. The sale was disclosed in an SEC Form 4 filing. GEVO shares traded up to $2.43 on the day with 7.32 million shares changing hands, and the company reported quarterly EPS of ($0.02), surpassing the ($0.03) estimate, with revenue of $45.35 million.

feed.title: Stifel cuts Gambling.com stock price target to $8 on guidance miss
feed.summary: Stifel has lowered its price target for Gambling.com Group Ltd. (NASDAQ:GAMB) to $8 from $12 while maintaining a Buy rating, following the company's fiscal 2026 revenue and EBITDA guidance falling below expectations. The reduced outlook is attributed to a U.K. tax hike, regulatory changes in Finland, and re-accelerating SEO impact, though Stifel notes the stock's undervaluation and strong gross profit margins. Other firms like Truist Securities and Texas Capital Securities have also adjusted their price targets due to the guidance miss.

feed.title: Will Stockpiling Lawsuits Overstate BellRing Brands' (BRBR) Growth Story And Shift Its Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: BellRing Brands is facing multiple securities class action lawsuits alleging that its past sales growth was inflated by retailer inventory stockpiling rather than true consumer demand. These lawsuits introduce uncertainty to the company's investment narrative, questioning the quality and durability of its revenue, especially ahead of the March 23, 2026 lead plaintiff deadline. The core issue for investors is how these legal challenges, combined with competitive pressures, will affect BellRing's future growth prospects and valuations, potentially diverging from optimistic analyst forecasts.

feed.title: BankUnited, Inc. Experiences Revision in Its Stock Evaluation Amid Market Dynamics
feed.summary: BankUnited, Inc. has seen a revision in its stock valuation, with its price currently at $46.70. Despite a recent decline from $49.48, the company recorded a 25.40% return over the past year, outperforming the S&P 500. Key metrics include a P/E ratio of 11, a price-to-book value of 0.94, and a high dividend yield of 80.22%, positioning it competitively within the regional banking sector.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Ulta Beauty Q4 2025 beats expectations with strong sales growth
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty reported strong Q4 2025 results, with EPS of $8.01 and revenue of $3.9 billion, both exceeding Wall Street expectations, driven by holiday sales and loyalty program expansion. Despite a post-earnings stock dip, the company projects continued growth for fiscal 2026, focusing on market share expansion, digital innovation, and international reach while managing increased SG&A expenses. The call also highlighted strategic investments, including a TikTok Shop integration and new DC construction, alongside efforts in K-beauty and wellness categories.

feed.title: Institutional Buying and Earnings Beat Might Change The Case For Investing In Pinnacle West Capital (PNW)
feed.summary: Institutional investors, including Neo Ivy Capital Management, First Trust Advisors, and Victory Capital, have recently increased their positions in Pinnacle West Capital (PNW). This surge in institutional demand, coupled with better-than-expected Q4 earnings and solid customer growth in Arizona, is drawing renewed attention to the utility's earnings outlook and dividend profile. Despite this positive momentum, the article advises investors to remain aware of potential risks such as regulatory lag and increased grid spending.

feed.title: Arista Networks (ANET) Valuation Check After Recent Pullback In High Speed Switch Growth Story
feed.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) has experienced a recent share price pullback, prompting a re-evaluation of its valuation despite strong multi-year returns and double-digit growth. While one narrative suggests the stock is 5.5% overvalued at $134.03 compared to a fair value of $127.06, a discounted cash flow (DCF) model indicates it may be 12.6% below an estimated fair value of $153.35. Investors are encouraged to explore both perspectives and consider the company's growth profile, profitability, and potential risks in the high-speed switch market.

feed.title: Is Kimberly-Clark’s (KMB) New Tech Chief a Subtle Shift in Its Competitive Playbook?
feed.summary: Kimberly-Clark recently appointed Francesco Tinto as Chief Information & Global Business Services Officer, which could influence the company's "Powering Care" strategy and technology investments. While his appointment aligns with the company's investment narrative of product innovation and cost discipline, it doesn't significantly alter near-term risks related to competition and consumer behavior. The article suggests investors consider Kimberly-Clark's revenue and earnings forecasts, which project a fair value of $119.21, and compare them with more optimistic analyst estimates, while also highlighting key rewards and warning signs for potential investors.

feed.title: Assessing Intuitive Surgical’s Valuation As Near Term Share Performance Contrasts With Longer Term Gains
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) has seen mixed share performance recently, with negative short-term returns contrasting with significant long-term gains. Despite a recent dip, analysts suggest the stock is undervalued with a fair value of $532.46 against its current trading price of $479.27, driven by its robust recurring revenue model from its large installed base of da Vinci systems. However, its high P/E ratio of 59.6x compared to the industry average raises questions about potential valuation risk if expectations cool.

feed.title: Arch Capital Group (NASDAQ:ACGL) CEO Sells $2,112,078.30 in Stock
feed.summary: Arch Capital Group's CEO, Nicolas Papadopoulo, sold 21,930 shares of company stock on March 10th for over $2.1 million, reducing his stake by 2.45%. This transaction comes as the company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue. The stock's performance and analyst ratings are mixed, with a "Hold" average rating and significant institutional ownership.

feed.title: International Paper (NYSE:IP) Director Acquires $499,999.11 in Stock
feed.summary: International Paper (NYSE:IP) Director Anders Gustafsson recently purchased 13,217 shares of the company's stock for $499,999.11, increasing his total holdings to 26,092 shares, valued at approximately $987,060. This acquisition follows an earlier purchase of 12,875 shares on March 11th. Despite this insider buying, the stock traded down 8.1% to $35.52 after the company reported quarterly EPS of ($0.08), missing analyst expectations, though revenue rose to $6.01 billion.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Emerson Electric (NYSE:EMR) CEO Sells 5,700 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Emerson Electric's CEO, Surendralal Lanca Karsanbhai, sold 5,700 shares of company stock on March 10th for over $811,000, reducing his stake by nearly 2%. This sale occurred as Emerson's shares pulled back significantly, though the company recently beat EPS estimates and provided strong FY2026 guidance. Institutional investors have been actively trading EMR, and analysts generally hold a "Hold" rating with an average price target of $164.85.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) Insider Susan Lamonica Sells 13,258 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) insider Susan Lamonica sold 13,258 shares of the company's stock on March 11th for $769,494.32, reducing her stake by 7.4%. Following the sale, Lamonica owns 165,971 shares valued at approximately $9.63 million. The company recently reported quarterly earnings that beat analyst estimates and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.46.

feed.title: American Tower (NYSE:AMT) Director Rajesh Kalathur Buys 2,671 Shares
feed.summary: American Tower (NYSE:AMT) Director Rajesh Kalathur recently purchased 2,671 shares of the company's stock for $494,936.30, increasing his stake by 117.92% to a total of 4,936 shares. The company also declared an increased quarterly dividend of $1.79 and reported Q4 earnings that missed estimates but had revenue that exceeded expectations. Analysts currently rate American Tower with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average target price of $217.35.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Arch Capital Group (NASDAQ:ACGL) Insider Sells 5,907 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Arch Capital Group (NASDAQ:ACGL) director David Gansberg sold 5,907 shares of the company's stock on March 10th for approximately $569,258, reducing his stake by 1.72%. This transaction follows Arch Capital's recent strong Q4 earnings, where the company surpassed analyst expectations with an EPS of $2.98 and revenue of $4.93 billion. Despite the insider sale, institutions hold a significant 89.07% of the stock, and analysts maintain an average "Hold" rating with a target price of $109.20.

feed.title: Digital Realty builds out 1 million-square-foot data center campus in Garland
feed.summary: Digital Realty is continuing the development of a massive 1 million-square-foot data center campus in Garland, Texas. Construction on a new 236,600-square-foot phase, estimated at $140 million, is expected to begin this summer and finish by June 2027. The project builds upon an already underway campus, expanding the region's data center infrastructure.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Ulta Beauty Q4 2025 beats expectations with strong sales growth
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty reported strong financial results for Q4 fiscal 2025, surpassing earnings expectations with an EPS of $8.01 and revenue of $3.9 billion, driven by robust holiday sales and comparable sales growth of 5.8%. Despite a post-earnings stock dip, the company projects continued growth for fiscal 2026, with anticipated net sales between $13.1 billion and $13.2 billion and EPS between $28.05 and $28.55, focusing on strategic investments, international expansion, and operational efficiencies. Ulta Beauty emphasized its commitment to differentiating its core business, scaling new ventures like the TikTok Shop integration, and optimizing its foundation for future sustainable, profitable growth while navigating a competitive and dynamic market.

feed.title: Amazon plans to move Prime Day event to June from July, Bloomberg News reports
feed.summary: Amazon is reportedly planning to shift its annual Prime Day sales event from July to late June, according to Bloomberg News. This change would move the critical shopping event, known for significant discounts, into Amazon's second fiscal quarter. The move could also help Amazon compete more effectively with similar sales events offered by rivals like Walmart and Target.

feed.title: Copart: A Valuation Derating Has Made It A Buy (Rating Upgrade) (NASDAQ:CPRT)
feed.summary: Copart, Inc. (CPRT) shares have fallen by approximately 46%, but are now considered a buy due to trading at a low 15.4x EV/EBITDA multiple, significantly below historical averages. The current headwinds, including declining insurance volumes and softer claims, are viewed as temporary and do not compromise CPRT's fundamental strength. The company's aggressive share buybacks, strong liquidity, and long-term tailwinds like population growth and increasing total-loss frequency support a bullish outlook as cyclical pressures are expected to ease.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Elizabeth O'Callahan Sells 1,000 Shares of NetApp Inc (NTAP)
feed.summary: Elizabeth O'Callahan, Executive Vice President and Chief Administrative Officer at NetApp Inc, sold 1,000 shares of NTAP on March 10, 2026. This transaction leaves her with 20,382 shares of the company. NetApp Inc, a global cloud-led, data-centric software company, is currently considered modestly undervalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.9.

feed.title: Textron : Pasadena Police Department to Add Two Bell 505s to their Fleet
feed.summary: The Pasadena Police Department is expanding its Air Operations Section by adding two Bell 505 helicopters, enhancing its public safety capabilities. This purchase, announced at VAI Verticon 2026, will supplement their existing Bell 206Bs and includes advanced mission equipment integrated by CNC Technologies. The Bell 505, known for its versatility and advanced technology, is deployed globally and will help improve response times and provide critical aerial support for Pasadena and surrounding cities.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Company Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend, Payable on May 15, 2026
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive Company announced that its Board of Directors has increased the quarterly common stock cash dividend from $0.52 to $0.53 per share, effective in the second quarter of 2026. This dividend will be paid on May 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 20, 2026. The new annualized dividend rate is $2.12 per share, up from $2.08.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Cruises: The 2026 Upgrades US Travelers Should Not Ignore
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean is enhancing its cruise experience for 2026 with bigger ships, smarter technology, and US-focused itineraries, aiming to attract American travelers with resort-like offerings. While these upgrades include extensive entertainment and family-friendly infrastructure, potential cruisers should be aware of possible crowds, additional costs, and the fast-paced, high-energy environment. The article advises that Royal Caribbean best suits those seeking an entertainment-first, structured vacation, rather than a quiet cultural immersion.

feed.title: Expeditors International Fell 2% This Week. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Shares of Expeditors International (EXPD) fell 2% this week, trading near $143, as investors continue to assess the freight market's recovery. Despite a recent upgrade from Wolfe Research, institutional sentiment is mixed, with some increasing stakes and others reducing exposure. A valuation model suggests a target price of $167, implying 19% upside, contingent on global shipping volumes stabilizing and freight pricing normalizing.

feed.title: Insider Sell: John Plansky Sells 16,100 Shares of State Street C
feed.summary: John Plansky, Executive Vice President of State Street Global Advisors, sold 16,100 shares of State Street Corp (STT) on March 11, 2026. Following this transaction, Plansky now owns 56,162 shares. State Street Corp is currently considered modestly overvalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.15.

feed.title: D. Boral Capital Reiterates 'Buy' Rating for FibroBiologics
feed.summary: D. Boral Capital has reaffirmed its 'buy' rating for FibroBiologics (NASDAQ:FBLG) with a $7.00 price target, despite HC Wainwright lowering its target to $4.00. The decision highlights analysts' long-term confidence in the Houston-based cell therapy company's innovative approach, even with potential near-term stock price challenges. FibroBiologics focuses on developing treatments for chronic diseases using proprietary fibroblast cell technology and holds over 150 patents.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Brian Posner Sells 3,000 Shares of Arch Capital Gr
feed.summary: Brian Posner, a Director at Arch Capital Group Ltd (ACGL), sold 3,000 shares of the company on March 11, 2026. This transaction reduces his total holdings to 3,000 shares, and follows a pattern of 1 insider buy and 11 insider sells over the past year. The stock was trading at $17.12, suggesting it is modestly undervalued according to GuruFocus's GF Value.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Susan Lamonica Sells Shares of Citizens Financial Group Inc (CFG)
feed.summary: Susan Lamonica, Chief Human Resources Officer of Citizens Financial Group Inc (CFG), sold 13,258 shares of the company on March 11, 2026, reducing her holdings to 165,971 shares. This transaction marks the only insider sell recorded for the company in the past year, with no insider buys. The stock is currently trading at $58.04, indicating it is modestly overvalued compared to its GF Value of $44.19.

feed.title: News | Burlington, Ross among bidders offering $36.3 million for half of Saks Off 5th leases
feed.summary: Burlington Stores and Ross Dress for Less are among the bidders offering a total of $36.3 million for 31 of the 59 available Saks Off 5th store leases, following Saks Global's decision to close most locations after filing for Chapter 11 bankruptcy. Burlington bid $22 million for 22 leases, while Ross bid $4 million for four leases. Separately, the lease for a Saks Fifth Avenue store in Bala Cynwyd, Pennsylvania, was negotiated for sale to AD Tenant Holdings for $8.4 million.
